original text:
This entry was posted on Tuesday, January 18th, 2011 at 1:15 pm and is filed under Photos.	You can follow any responses to this entry through the RSS 2.0 feed. You can leave a response, or trackback from your own site.
OOOch! Don't think I could do that on my knee!
Al  -  those are not just any old trousers but Paramos !!!
I have to say that when I first saw that pic I thought it was a still from Alien.
